Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Continued To Dec-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John O'Connor and Dave Hines for William Gabriel (Co-Executor). M. Dean Sutton for and with Emil Gabriel (Petitioner).

Mr. O'Connor stated that Mr. Hines and Mr. Sutton had spoken, that this was a will with a no contest provision, that there was a campanion suit, that his Client thought Emil had no standing to bring this action and that he feared the estate would be consumed in legal fees. The Court stated that it was prepared to remove both of the Co-Executors. Mr. Hines stated that he thought the Parties could agree on a professional fiduciary. The Court stated that the powers of the Co-Executors would be suspended upon appointment of the new Successor Executor. The matter was continued to December 15, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Sutton is to prepare the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition To Suspend The Powers Of Co Executor Emil H Gabriel And To Instruct Co Executor William H Gabriel To Excercise His Powers Without The Concurrence Of Co Executor Emil H Gabriel
